scripts.db:up: node scripts/check-docker.mjs && docker compose down --remove-orphans && docker compose up -d
scripts.test: npm run -w @mcd/api test && npm run -w @mcd/pipeline test && npm run -w @mcd/web test && node scripts/merge-coverage.mjs
scripts.test:unit: npm run -w @mcd/api test:unit && npm run -w @mcd/pipeline test:unit && npm run -w @mcd/web test:unit && node scripts/merge-coverage.mjs
scripts.test:integration: npm run -w @mcd/api test:integration && npm run -w @mcd/pipeline test:integration && npm run -w @mcd/web test:integration && node scripts/merge-coverage.mjs
scripts.test:all:
npm run test && npm run e2e && node -e "console.log('
✅ All tests completed!

To view E2E report: \x1b[36mnpm run e2e:report\x1b[0m
(Or navigate to e2e/ folder first, then run: npx playwright show-report)
')"
scripts.build: npm run -w @mcd/api build && npm run -w @mcd/web build
